description: You are a robotics engineer working on a drone state estimation system in /home/ga/PycharmProjects/drone_estimator. The project implements an Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) to fuse IMU and GPS data, but the estimator is currently diverging. Fix the mathematical and logic bugs in estimator/ekf.py, specifically in the prediction step, the GPS measurement update matrix, and the covariance update logic. Ensure the system passes all tests and meets the trajectory evaluation requirements without modifying the tests or evaluation scripts.

bug_descriptions: Prediction step ignores dt in position integration
GPS measurement matrix H maps to wrong state indices
Covariance update uses addition instead of subtraction
